name: dicha-life
description: dicha · 像素风 2.5D 个人物品管理 OS

scripts.deploy: docker compose down --remove-orphans && docker compose pull api web && docker compose up -d --force-recreate --remove-orphans
scripts.deploy:build: docker compose down --remove-orphans && docker image prune -f && docker compose build --no-cache && docker compose up -d --force-recreate --remove-orphans
scripts.deploy:fresh: docker compose down -v --remove-orphans && docker compose pull api web && docker compose up -d --force-recreate --remove-orphans
